headline_state: Original deep audit. GA4 Key Events at 0. Phone call lead goal 'Needs attention'. 'Form doesn't capture GCLID' suspected (later retracted May 9).

lead.trackingStatus: ⚠ Form GCLID capture suspect (later proven incorrect on May 9)

call.trackingStatus: ⚠ Phone call lead goal: Needs attention

funnel.verifiedNote: Tracking gap suspected — GCLID not captured (later retracted)

insights.headline: The /free-estimate/ form does not capture GCLID or UTM hidden fields
insights.body: Add hidden fields TODAY reading from URL params + _gcl_aw cookie. (Note: this finding was retracted on May 9 after live verification proved the form DOES capture GCLID correctly.)

insights.headline: GA4 has 0 Key Events configured
insights.body: Mark generate_lead as a Key Event in GA4 Admin → Events. Then import to Ads as a primary conversion action.

insights.headline: Phone call lead goal is in 'Needs attention' status
insights.body: Applied to all 6 campaigns. Re-verify call tracking number, GTM event, primary/secondary status, GCLID/wbraid pass-through.

insights.headline: Active campaign at 14% impression share — losing 62% to ad rank
insights.body: 91 keywords, only 5 with measurable Quality Score. Average QS 2.8/10. Landing Page Experience 'Below average' on 4 of 5 measurable keywords.

insights.headline: Competitor brand exclusion list has 5 entries; 40+ Madison-area competitor brands bleeding budget
Active campaign spending only 20% of budget cap
insights.body: $11.89/day actual vs $60/day cap. 'Bid setting limited' warning + Maximize Clicks strategy = throttled.
